pairs.en: Monday, March 2, 2026 at 5 p.m. ET
pairs.zh:
2026年3月2日星期一美国东部时间下午5点
Monday, March 2, 2026 at 5 p.m. ET

pairs.en: Call participants
pairs.zh: 呼叫参与者

pairs.en: President and CEO — Chirantan “CJ” Desai
pairs.zh:
总裁兼首席执行官 — Chirantan “CJ” Desai

President and CEO — Chirantan “CJ” Desai

pairs.en: Chief Financial Officer — Michael Berry
pairs.zh:
首席财务官 — Michael Berry  
原文：Chief Financial Officer — Michael Berry

pairs.en: Vice President, Investor Relations — Jess Lubert
pairs.zh:
投资者关系副总裁 — Jess Lubert

Vice President, Investor Relations — Jess Lubert

pairs.en: Total revenue-- $695 million, representing 27% year-over-year growth and exceeding the high end of the company's own guidance by 4%.
pairs.zh:
总收入——6.95亿美元，同比增长27%，超出公司自身指引的高端4%。

Total revenue-- $695 million, representing 27% year-over-year growth and exceeding the high end of the company's own guidance by 4%.

pairs.en: Atlas revenue-- Grew 29% year over year, surpassed the $2 billion run rate mark, and contributed a record $114 million in net new revenue for the quarter, accounting for 72% of total revenue, up from 71%.
pairs.zh:
Atlas收入——同比增长29%，突破了20亿美元年化收入门槛，本季度净新增收入创纪录地达到1.14亿美元，占总收入的72%，高于上一季度的71%。

Atlas revenue-- Grew 29% year over year, surpassed the $2 billion run rate mark, and contributed a record $114 million in net new revenue for the quarter, accounting for 72% of total revenue, up from 71%.

pairs.en: Non-Atlas revenue-- Increased 20% year over year, producing the best quarterly growth in the past two years.
pairs.zh:
非Atlas收入同比增长20%，创下过去两年最佳季度增长。

Non-Atlas revenue-- Increased 20% year over year, producing the best quarterly growth in the past two years.

pairs.en: Customer count-- Ended with over 65,200 customers, adding 2,700 in the quarter, and achieved a 60% full-year increase in additions.
pairs.zh:
客户数量——期末客户数超过65,200家，本季度新增2,700家，全年新增客户数同比增长60%。

Customer count-- Ended with over 65,200 customers, adding 2,700 in the quarter, and achieved a 60% full-year increase in additions.

pairs.en: Operating margin-- Reported at 23%, an improvement from 21% a year ago, with positive GAAP operating income for the quarter.
pairs.zh:
营业利润率——报告为23%，较一年前的21%有所提升，本季度实现了正的GAAP营业利润。

原文：Operating margin-- Reported at 23%, an improvement from 21% a year ago, with positive GAAP operating income for the quarter.

pairs.en: Net income-- $143 million, or $1.65 per share based on 86.5 million diluted shares, up from $108 million and $1.28 per share on 84.6 million diluted shares last year.
pairs.zh:
净利润——1.43亿美元，基于8650万稀释股计算每股收益1.65美元，高于去年基于8460万稀释股计算的1.08亿美元和每股1.28美元。

Net income-- $143 million, or $1.65 per share based on 86.5 million diluted shares, up from $108 million and $1.28 per share on 84.6 million diluted shares last year.

pairs.en: Total company net ARR expansion rate-- Reached 121%, increasing from 120% last quarter and 119% a year prior.
pairs.zh:
公司整体净ARR扩张率——达到121%，高于上季度的120%和去年同期的119%。

Total company net ARR expansion rate-- Reached 121%, increasing from 120% last quarter and 119% a year prior.

pairs.en: Non-Atlas ARR-- Grew 13% year over year, excluding duration impact, with increased momentum from financial services, public sector, and technology customers.
pairs.zh:
Non-Atlas ARR——同比增长13%（排除期限影响），来自金融服务、公共部门和技术客户的增长势头增强。

Non-Atlas ARR-- Grew 13% year over year, excluding duration impact, with increased momentum from financial services, public sector, and technology customers.

pairs.en: RPO (remaining performance obligations)-- Rose to $1.47 billion from $748 million, a 97% year-over-year growth.
pairs.zh:
RPO（剩余履约义务）——从7.48亿美元增长至14.7亿美元，同比增长97%。

RPO (remaining performance obligations)-- Rose to $1.47 billion from $748 million, a 97% year-over-year growth.

pairs.en: Large deals closed-- Included an approximately $90 million Atlas deal with a major tech company and a greater than $100 million Enterprise Advanced (EA) deal with a large financial institution, noted as the largest total contract value in company history.
pairs.zh:
大型交易完成——包括与一家大型科技公司达成的约9000万美元的Atlas交易，以及与一家大型金融机构达成的超过1亿美元的Enterprise Advanced（EA）交易，这被指出是公司历史上最大的总合同价值。

Large deals closed-- Included an approximately $90 million Atlas deal with a major tech company and a greater than $100 million Enterprise Advanced (EA) deal with a large financial institution, noted as the largest total contract value in company history.

pairs.en: Customers generating $100,000+ ARR-- 2,799 customers;customers generating $1 million+ ARR-- 402 customers. (Management noted rapid growth in these cohorts, but the 1,726% figure appears to be a transcript error and is omitted for accuracy.)
pairs.zh:
年化经常性收入（ARR）超过10万美元的客户——2,799个；年化经常性收入超过100万美元的客户——402个。（管理层指出这些客户群体增长迅速，但1,726%这一数字似乎是记录错误，为准确性起见已省略。）

Customers generating $100,000+ ARR-- 2,799 customers;customers generating $1 million+ ARR-- 402 customers. (Management noted rapid growth in these cohorts, but the 1,726% figure appears to be a transcript error and is omitted for accuracy.)

pairs.en: Feature usage in Atlas-- Of Atlas customers producing $100,000+ ARR, 44% use two or more platform features, rising from 36% prior year.
pairs.zh:
Atlas中的功能使用——在产生10万美元以上ARR的Atlas客户中，44%使用了两个或更多平台功能，高于前一年的36%。  
Feature usage in Atlas-- Of Atlas customers producing $100,000+ ARR, 44% use two or more platform features, rising from 36% prior year.

pairs.en: Operating cash flow-- $180 million;free cash flow-- $177 million, comparing favorably to $51 million and $23 million, respectively, last year.
pairs.zh:
经营现金流——1.8亿美元；自由现金流——1.77亿美元，相比去年分别为5100万美元和2300万美元，表现更佳。

Operating cash flow-- $180 million;free cash flow-- $177 million, comparing favorably to $51 million and $23 million, respectively, last year.

pairs.en: Cash, equivalents, and investments-- Nearly $2.4 billion at quarter-end.
pairs.zh:
现金、等价物和投资——季度末接近$2.4 billion。

Cash, equivalents, and investments-- Nearly $2.4 billion at quarter-end.

pairs.en: Atlas revenue guidance-- Projected growth of approximately 26% in Q1 and 21%-23% for fiscal 2027.
pairs.zh:
Atlas收入指引——第一季度预计增长约26%，2027财年预计增长21%-23%。

Atlas revenue guidance-- Projected growth of approximately 26% in Q1 and 21%-23% for fiscal 2027.

pairs.en: Non-Atlas revenue guidance-- Expected mid to upper single-digit growth in Q1 and low to mid single-digit growth for fiscal 2027.
pairs.zh:
Non-Atlas收入指引——预计第一季度中至高个位数增长，2027财年低至中个位数增长。

Non-Atlas revenue guidance-- Expected mid to upper single-digit growth in Q1 and low to mid single-digit growth for fiscal 2027.

pairs.en: Total fiscal 2027 revenue guidance-- Anticipated at $2.86 billion to $2.9 billion, equating to 16%-18% growth.
pairs.zh:
2027财年总收入指引——预计为$2.86 billion至$2.9 billion，对应16%-18%的增长。

Total fiscal 2027 revenue guidance-- Anticipated at $2.86 billion to $2.9 billion, equating to 16%-18% growth.

pairs.en: Fiscal 2027 operating margin guidance-- ~19.5% (non-GAAP) at the high end of guidance; commitment to expanding operating margin by 100 basis points while investing for growth.
pairs.zh:
2027财年运营利润率指引——在指引上限约为19.5%（非GAAP）；承诺在投资增长的同时将运营利润率扩大100个基点。

Fiscal 2027 operating margin guidance-- ~19.5% (non-GAAP) at the high end of guidance; commitment to expanding operating margin by 100 basis points while investing for growth.

pairs.en: Capital allocation-- 100% of free cash flow planned for share repurchases and settling employee RSU tax obligations in fiscal 2027; $55 million spent this quarter repurchasing 133,000 shares.
pairs.zh:
资本配置——计划将2027财年100%的自由现金流用于股票回购和结算员工RSU税务义务；本季度花费5500万美元回购133,000股股票。

Capital allocation-- 100% of free cash flow planned for share repurchases and settling employee RSU tax obligations in fiscal 2027; $55 million spent this quarter repurchasing 133,000 shares.

pairs.en: AI product uptake metrics-- The number of customers using vector search and Voyage embedding models nearly doubled year over year.
pairs.zh:
AI产品采用指标——使用向量搜索和Voyage嵌入模型的客户数量同比增长近一倍。

AI product uptake metrics-- The number of customers using vector search and Voyage embedding models nearly doubled year over year.

pairs.en: Leadership changes-- Erica Woolini appointed as Chief Customer Officer, effective March 3; Cedric Pash and Paul Kepambesis to depart, with a new CRO search in late stages and leadership transition planned through Q2.
pairs.zh:
领导层变动——Erica Woolini被任命为首席客户官，自3月3日起生效；Cedric Pash和Paul Kepambesis将离职，新任CRO的遴选已进入后期阶段，领导层过渡计划将贯穿Q2。

Leadership changes-- Erica Woolini appointed as Chief Customer Officer, effective March 3; Cedric Pash and Paul Kepambesis to depart, with a new CRO search in late stages and leadership transition planned through Q2.

pairs.en: MongoDB(MDB+2.97%)reported accelerated growth across both Atlas and non-Atlas product lines, highlighted by all-time record new ARR and substantial large enterprise deals in regulated industries. Management indicated broad-based demand from AI native, fintech, public sector, and Fortune 500 cohorts, with specific expansion in AI workloads and deeper adoption of platform features among high-value Atlas customers. Strategic execution included a significant increase in RPO, prioritization of feature parity for EA with Atlas, and a leadership transition designed to support expanded go-to-market initiatives, especially in the AI and enterprise segments.
pairs.zh:
MongoDB(MDB+2.97%)报告称，其Atlas和非Atlas产品线均实现加速增长，新ARR创下历史新高，且在受监管行业中达成了大量大型企业交易。管理层指出，来自AI原生、金融科技、公共部门和财富500强企业的需求广泛，尤其是在AI工作负载方面出现具体扩张，高价值Atlas客户对平台功能的采用也更加深入。战略执行层面包括显著增加RPO、优先实现EA与Atlas的功能对等，以及领导层过渡，旨在支持扩大市场推广计划，特别是在AI和企业领域。

MongoDB(MDB+2.97%)reported accelerated growth across both Atlas and non-Atlas product lines, highlighted by all-time record new ARR and substantial large enterprise deals in regulated industries. Management indicated broad-based demand from AI native, fintech, public sector, and Fortune 500 cohorts, with specific expansion in AI workloads and deeper adoption of platform features among high-value Atlas customers. Strategic execution included a significant increase in RPO, prioritization of feature parity for EA with Atlas, and a leadership transition designed to support expanded go-to-market initiatives, especially in the AI and enterprise segments.

pairs.en: CEO Desai stated, "MongoDB's foundation is in great shape, and the company is well on its way to become the generational data platform of choice in the AI and multi-cloud era."
pairs.zh:
CEO Desai 表示：“MongoDB 的基础非常稳固，该公司正稳步成为人工智能和多云时代跨代数据平台的首选。”
CEO Desai stated, "MongoDB's foundation is in great shape, and the company is well on its way to become the generational data platform of choice in the AI and multi-cloud era."

pairs.en: New customer activity was sustained by self-service motions, in addition to upmarket sales, with record new ARR driven by EMEA team performance at major financial institutions, retailers, and technology companies.
pairs.zh:
新客户活动由自助服务举措以及高端销售共同推动，EMEA团队在大型金融机构、零售商和科技公司的表现带来了创纪录的新增ARR。

New customer activity was sustained by self-service motions, in addition to upmarket sales, with record new ARR driven by EMEA team performance at major financial institutions, retailers, and technology companies.

pairs.en: Large bundled Atlas and EA deals materially benefited non-Atlas results, while Atlas revenue attribution was affected by one unusually large transaction where "we had to attribute more of that revenue to EA versus Atlas," according to Berry.
pairs.zh:
按照Berry的说法，大型捆绑的Atlas和EA交易实质上使非Atlas业绩受益，而Atlas的收入归属则受到一笔异常大的交易影响，“我们不得不将更多该笔收入归于EA而非Atlas”。

Large bundled Atlas and EA deals materially benefited non-Atlas results, while Atlas revenue attribution was affected by one unusually large transaction where "we had to attribute more of that revenue to EA versus Atlas," according to Berry.

pairs.en: On-premises deployment demand increased with EA positioned as mission critical among major financial, telecom, and government customers; multiple references emphasized customer insistence on operational resilience and hybrid infrastructure.
pairs.zh:
本地部署需求增长，EA在主要金融、电信和政府客户中被定位为关键任务；多个参考案例强调客户坚持运营韧性和混合基础设施。

原文：
On-premises deployment demand increased with EA positioned as mission critical among major financial, telecom, and government customers; multiple references emphasized customer insistence on operational resilience and hybrid infrastructure.

pairs.en: CFO Berry confirmed expectations for 80%-100% operating cash conversion in fiscal 2027, in line with long-term company targets.
pairs.zh:
首席财务官Berry确认了2027财年80%-100%的经营现金转换率的预期，符合公司长期目标。

CFO Berry confirmed expectations for 80%-100% operating cash conversion in fiscal 2027, in line with long-term company targets.

pairs.en: AI contributions to revenue remain nascent, but the customer base adopting agentic and AI-related database features grew rapidly.
pairs.zh:
AI对收入的贡献仍处于初期阶段，但采用代理型和AI相关数据库功能的客户基础快速增长。

AI contributions to revenue remain nascent, but the customer base adopting agentic and AI-related database features grew rapidly.

pairs.en: Industry glossary
pairs.zh: 行业术语

pairs.en: Atlas: MongoDB's fully managed cloud database service, providing multi-cloud deployment and integrated features such as search, vector search, and embeddings.
pairs.zh:
Atlas：MongoDB的完全托管云数据库服务，提供多云部署以及搜索、向量搜索和嵌入等集成功能。

原文：Atlas: MongoDB's fully managed cloud database service, providing multi-cloud deployment and integrated features such as search, vector search, and embeddings.

pairs.en: Enterprise Advanced (EA): The company’s commercial, on-premises database offering designed for regulated enterprise workloads, supporting hybrid environments.
pairs.zh:
企业高级版（EA）：该公司的商业本地部署数据库产品，专为受监管的企业工作负载设计，支持混合环境。

Enterprise Advanced (EA): The company’s commercial, on-premises database offering designed for regulated enterprise workloads, supporting hybrid environments.

pairs.en: Vector search: A database capability allowing for similarity search on high-dimensional datasets, critical for AI and machine learning applications.
pairs.zh:
向量搜索：一种数据库功能，允许在高维数据集上进行相似性搜索，对人工智能和机器学习应用至关重要。  
Vector search: A database capability allowing for similarity search on high-dimensional datasets, critical for AI and machine learning applications.

pairs.en: Voyage: MongoDB's embedding model technology, enabling deeper integration of AI/machine learning within customer applications.
pairs.zh:
Voyage：MongoDB的嵌入模型技术，能够在客户应用中实现AI/机器学习的更深层次集成。

Voyage: MongoDB's embedding model technology, enabling deeper integration of AI/machine learning within customer applications.

pairs.en: ARR (annual recurring revenue): A metric representing the predictable and recurring revenue components generated from customer contracts over a one-year period.
pairs.zh:
ARR（年度经常性收入）：一个指标，代表从客户合同中产生的一年期内可预测且经常性的收入组成部分。  
原文：ARR (annual recurring revenue): A metric representing the predictable and recurring revenue components generated from customer contracts over a one-year period.

pairs.en: RPO (remaining performance obligations): The total contracted revenue not yet recognized on the balance sheet, reflecting future revenue under existing agreements.
pairs.zh:
RPO（剩余履约义务）：资产负债表上尚未确认的合同收入总额，反映现有协议下的未来收入。

RPO (remaining performance obligations): The total contracted revenue not yet recognized on the balance sheet, reflecting future revenue under existing agreements.

pairs.en: Full Conference Call Transcript
pairs.zh: 完整的电话会议记录

pairs.en: Jess Lubert:Thank you, operator. Good afternoon, and thank you for joining us today to review MongoDB, Inc.'s fourth quarter and full-year fiscal 2026 financial results, which we announced in our press release issued after the close of market today. Joining me on the call today are Chirantan “CJ” Desai, President and CEO of MongoDB, Inc., and Michael Berry, CFO of MongoDB, Inc. During this call, we will make forward-looking statements, including statements related to our future growth opportunities, our opportunity to win new business, our expectations regarding Atlas consumption growth, the impact of non-Atlas business and multiyear license revenue, the long-term opportunity of AI, our financial guidance and underlying assumptions, and our investments and growth opportunities in AI.
pairs.zh:
Jess Lubert：谢谢，接线员。下午好，感谢大家今天加入我们，回顾MongoDB, Inc.的2026财年第四季度及全年财务业绩，我们已在今天市场收盘后发布的新闻稿中公布了这些结果。今天与我一同出席电话会议的是MongoDB, Inc.的总裁兼首席执行官Chirantan “CJ” Desai，以及MongoDB, Inc.的首席财务官Michael Berry。在本次电话会议中，我们将做出前瞻性陈述，包括与我们未来增长机遇、赢得新业务的机会、对Atlas消费增长的预期、非Atlas业务及多年期许可收入的影响、AI的长期机遇、我们的财务指引及基本假设，以及我们在AI方面的投资和增长机遇相关的陈述。

Jess Lubert:Thank you, operator. Good afternoon, and thank you for joining us today to review MongoDB, Inc.'s fourth quarter and full-year fiscal 2026 financial results, which we announced in our press release issued after the close of market today. Joining me on the call today are Chirantan “CJ” Desai, President and CEO of MongoDB, Inc., and Michael Berry, CFO of MongoDB, Inc. During this call, we will make forward-looking statements, including statements related to our future growth opportunities, our opportunity to win new business, our expectations regarding Atlas consumption growth, the impact of non-Atlas business and multiyear license revenue, the long-term opportunity of AI, our financial guidance and underlying assumptions, and our investments and growth opportunities in AI.

pairs.en: These statements are subject to a variety of risks and uncertainties, including the results of operations and financial conditions, that could cause actual results to differ materially from our expectations. For a discussion of material risks and uncertainties that could affect our actual results, please refer to the risks described in our Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the quarter ended 10/31/2025, filed with the SEC on 12/02/2025. Any forward-looking statements made on this call reflect our views only as of today, and we undertake no obligation to update them except as required by law. Additionally, we will discuss non-GAAP financial measures on this conference call.
pairs.zh:
这些声明面临各种风险和不确定性，包括经营业绩和财务状况，可能导致实际结果与我们的预期存在重大差异。有关可能影响我们实际结果的重大风险和不确定性的讨论，请参阅我们于2025年12月2日向美国证券交易委员会提交的截至2025年10月31日的季度报告Form 10-Q中描述的风险。本次电话会议中作出的任何前瞻性声明仅反映我们截至今日的观点，除法律要求外，我们没有义务对其进行更新。此外，我们将在本次电话会议中讨论非GAAP财务指标。

These statements are subject to a variety of risks and uncertainties, including the results of operations and financial conditions, that could cause actual results to differ materially from our expectations. For a discussion of material risks and uncertainties that could affect our actual results, please refer to the risks described in our Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the quarter ended 10/31/2025, filed with the SEC on 12/02/2025. Any forward-looking statements made on this call reflect our views only as of today, and we undertake no obligation to update them except as required by law. Additionally, we will discuss non-GAAP financial measures on this conference call.

pairs.en: Please refer to the tables in our earnings release on the Investor Relations portion of our website for a reconciliation of these measures to the most directly comparable GAAP financial measures. With that, I will now turn the call over to CJ.
pairs.zh:
请参阅我们网站投资者关系部分的财报发布中的表格，以了解这些指标与最直接可比的GAAP财务指标的对账。接下来，我将把电话交给CJ。

Please refer to the tables in our earnings release on the Investor Relations portion of our website for a reconciliation of these measures to the most directly comparable GAAP financial measures. With that, I will now turn the call over to CJ.

pairs.en: Chirantan Desai:Thank you, Jess, and thank you everyone for joining us today. To begin, I would like to provide some observations from my first full quarter at MongoDB, Inc. Over the last 100 days, I have spoken to more than 200 customers globally, spanning from AI natives to Fortune 500 enterprise customers that are leveraging the MongoDB, Inc. platform to drive innovation that is critical to their business.
pairs.zh:
Chirantan Desai:谢谢Jess，也谢谢大家今天加入我们。首先，我想分享一下我在MongoDB, Inc.的第一个完整季度的一些观察。在过去的100天里，我与全球超过200名客户进行了交谈，从AI原生公司到Fortune 500企业客户，他们正在利用MongoDB, Inc.平台推动对其业务至关重要的创新。

Chirantan Desai:Thank you, Jess, and thank you everyone for joining us today. To begin, I would like to provide some observations from my first full quarter at MongoDB, Inc. Over the last 100 days, I have spoken to more than 200 customers globally, spanning from AI natives to Fortune 500 enterprise customers that are leveraging the MongoDB, Inc. platform to drive innovation that is critical to their business.

pairs.en: Whether it is an AI or digital native looking for a highly performant solution that dynamically scales, a large enterprise looking for multi-cloud resiliency for their modern mission-critical applications, or a customer seeking an integrated offering for AI agents with features such as search, vector search, and embeddings in a single intelligent data layer, customers are excited about the strength of the MongoDB, Inc. platform. My key takeaway is that MongoDB, Inc.'s foundation is in great shape, and the company is well on its way to become the generational data platform of choice in the AI and multi-cloud era. Now on to this quarter's results.
pairs.zh:
无论是正在寻找动态扩展的高性能解决方案的AI或数字原生企业，还是寻求多云韧性以支撑其现代关键任务应用的大型企业，抑或是希望在单一智能数据层中获得集成搜索、向量搜索和嵌入等功能的AI代理产品的客户，大家均对MongoDB, Inc.平台的实力充满期待。我的核心观点是：MongoDB, Inc.的基础十分扎实，该公司正稳步成为AI与多云时代首选的数据平台。现在来看本季度的业绩。

Whether it is an AI or digital native looking for a highly performant solution that dynamically scales, a large enterprise looking for multi-cloud resiliency for their modern mission-critical applications, or a customer seeking an integrated offering for AI agents with features such as search, vector search, and embeddings in a single intelligent data layer, customers are excited about the strength of the MongoDB, Inc. platform. My key takeaway is that MongoDB, Inc.'s foundation is in great shape, and the company is well on its way to become the generational data platform of choice in the AI and multi-cloud era. Now on to this quarter's results.

pairs.en: We generated total revenue of $695,000,000, up 27% year over year, beating the high end of the guidance by 4%. Top-line strength was driven by Atlas, which grew 29% year over year, crossing the $2,000,000,000 run rate mark for the first time and generating a record $114,000,000 in net new revenue in the quarter. Non-Atlas grew 20% year over year, our best growth quarter in the last two years.
pairs.zh:
我们实现总营收$695,000,000，同比增长27%，超出指引上限4%。营收增长主要得益于Atlas，其同比增长29%，首次突破$2,000,000,000的年化运行率，并在本季度创下$114,000,000的净新增营收纪录。Non-Atlas同比增长20%，这是过去两年中增长最快的一个季度。

We generated total revenue of $695,000,000, up 27% year over year, beating the high end of the guidance by 4%. Top-line strength was driven by Atlas, which grew 29% year over year, crossing the $2,000,000,000 run rate mark for the first time and generating a record $114,000,000 in net new revenue in the quarter. Non-Atlas grew 20% year over year, our best growth quarter in the last two years.

pairs.en: We signed several large deals in the quarter, including an approximately $90,000,000 transaction with a large tech company that plans to expand both core and AI workloads on Atlas, and a greater than $100,000,000 transaction with a large financial institution for Enterprise Advanced, referred to as EA, representing the largest TCV deal in the history of 23% more than 100 basis points above the high end of guidance. We ended the quarter with over 65,200 customers, adding 2,700 customers in Q4, growing both year over year and quarter over quarter. This brings our full-year customer additions to a 60% year over year increase.
pairs.zh:
我们在本季度签署了几项大型交易，包括与一家大型科技公司达成的约$90,000,000交易，该公司计划在Atlas上扩展核心工作负载和AI工作负载；以及与一家大型金融机构达成的超过$100,000,000交易，用于Enterprise Advanced（简称EA），这是历史上最大的总合同价值（TCV）交易，比指引上限高出超过100个基点，增幅达23%。本季度末我们拥有超过65,200家客户，第四季度新增2,700家客户，同比和环比均实现增长。这使得我们全年的客户新增量同比增长60%。

原文：
We signed several large deals in the quarter, including an approximately $90,000,000 transaction with a large tech company that plans to expand both core and AI workloads on Atlas, and a greater than $100,000,000 transaction with a large financial institution for Enterprise Advanced, referred to as EA, representing the largest TCV deal in the history of 23% more than 100 basis points above the high end of guidance. We ended the quarter with over 65,200 customers, adding 2,700 customers in Q4, growing both year over year and quarter over quarter. This brings our full-year customer additions to a 60% year over year increase.

pairs.en: While AI is not yet a material driver to our results, we are encouraged by the growth we are seeing with customers leveraging our AI capabilities. The number of customers leveraging vector search has nearly doubled year over year, and the number of customers using Voyage embedding models has also doubled since the acquisition last February. This growth is across a diverse range of customers: AI natives, digital natives, and large enterprises. We finished fiscal 2026 on a high note, with strength in Q4 driven by our continued go-to-market execution and the broad-based demand we have seen across the business.
pairs.zh:
尽管人工智能尚未成为我们业绩的实质性驱动因素，但客户利用我们AI能力所展现的增长令我们感到鼓舞。使用向量搜索的客户数量同比增长近一倍，自去年二月收购以来，使用Voyage嵌入模型的客户数量也翻了一番。这一增长覆盖了多元化的客户群体：AI原生企业、数字原生企业以及大型企业。我们在2026财年圆满收官，第四季度的强劲表现得益于持续的市场执行策略以及业务中观察到的广泛需求。

原文：While AI is not yet a material driver to our results, we are encouraged by the growth we are seeing with customers leveraging our AI capabilities. The number of customers leveraging vector search has nearly doubled year over year, and the number of customers using Voyage embedding models has also doubled since the acquisition last February. This growth is across a diverse range of customers: AI natives, digital natives, and large enterprises. We finished fiscal 2026 on a high note, with strength in Q4 driven by our continued go-to-market execution and the broad-based demand we have seen across the business.

pairs.en: Our teams generated record new ARR in Q4, an acceleration of that metric in fiscal 2026, highlighting the strength of both our upmarket and self-service motions. Our EMEA team had an especially strong Q4, generating record new ARR driven by wins at major financial institutions, large retailers, and leading tech companies. At the same time, we outperformed on operating margin, achieving above a Rule of 40 performance and demonstrating that we can drive durable revenue growth while simultaneously expanding margin. Through my conversations with customers, a clear theme emerged. Large enterprises are increasingly standardizing on MongoDB, Inc. to power a wide spectrum of workloads, including both core mission-critical applications and emerging agentic AI applications.
pairs.zh:
我们的团队在Q4创下了新的ARR记录，该指标在2026财年加速增长，凸显了我们在高端市场与自助服务业务模式两方面的优势。我们的EMEA团队在Q4表现尤为强劲，凭借在大型金融机构、大型零售商以及领先科技公司赢得的订单，创造了新的ARR记录。同时，我们在营业利润率上表现优异，实现了超过Rule of 40的业绩，证明了我们能够在推动持续收入增长的同时扩大利润率。在与客户的交流中，一个清晰的趋势浮现出来：大型企业日益将MongoDB, Inc.作为标准平台，用于支持从核心任务关键型应用到新兴代理型AI应用的广泛工作负载。

Our teams generated record new ARR in Q4, an acceleration of that metric in fiscal 2026, highlighting the strength of both our upmarket and self-service motions. Our EMEA team had an especially strong Q4, generating record new ARR driven by wins at major financial institutions, large retailers, and leading tech companies. At the same time, we outperformed on operating margin, achieving above a Rule of 40 performance and demonstrating that we can drive durable revenue growth while simultaneously expanding margin. Through my conversations with customers, a clear theme emerged. Large enterprises are increasingly standardizing on MongoDB, Inc. to power a wide spectrum of workloads, including both core mission-critical applications and emerging agentic AI applications.

pairs.en: Rather than treating AI as a standalone initiative, many are expanding their use of us as a strategic data platform that supports both foundational workloads and the next generation of intelligent applications. For example, MongoDB, Inc. continues to power a wide range of workloads including high-volume transactional systems, real-time applications, and emerging AI workloads across multiple lines of business at JPMorgan Chase, the world's largest financial institution. The scale and breadth of our partnership with them reinforces our ability to serve as a strategic data platform for the most demanding enterprises.
pairs.zh:
许多企业不再将AI视为独立项目，而是扩大对我们作为战略数据平台的使用，该平台既能支撑基础工作负载，也能支持下一代智能应用。例如，MongoDB, Inc.持续为全球最大金融机构JPMorgan Chase的多个业务线提供支持，涵盖高容量交易系统、实时应用以及新兴AI工作负载。我们与对方的合作规模和广度，进一步强化了我们作为战略数据平台服务高要求企业的能力。

Rather than treating AI as a standalone initiative, many are expanding their use of us as a strategic data platform that supports both foundational workloads and the next generation of intelligent applications. For example, MongoDB, Inc. continues to power a wide range of workloads including high-volume transactional systems, real-time applications, and emerging AI workloads across multiple lines of business at JPMorgan Chase, the world's largest financial institution. The scale and breadth of our partnership with them reinforces our ability to serve as a strategic data platform for the most demanding enterprises.

pairs.en: We see tremendous opportunity to expand within our existing Fortune 500, Global 2,000, and AI native customer base, where I am actively leveraging my relationships to open new doors, engage the C-suite, and drive strategic expansion conversations top down. MongoDB, Inc. is increasingly recognized as the architectural foundation powering innovation for frontier model companies, leading digital natives expanding into AI, and AI native organizations scaling globally. The database layer has endured through multiple technology shifts over the past 60 years, and it is even more critical in this AI shift.
pairs.zh:
我们看到在现有的财富500强、全球2000强以及AI原生客户群中有着巨大的扩张机遇，我正积极利用自身关系开拓新渠道、接洽最高管理层，并自上而下推动战略性扩展对话。MongoDB, Inc. 日益被公认为支撑前沿模型公司创新、助力向AI转型的领先数字原生企业以及全球扩张的AI原生组织的架构基石。数据库层在过去60年间历经多次技术变革而屹立不倒，在此次AI转型中更显关键。

We see tremendous opportunity to expand within our existing Fortune 500, Global 2,000, and AI native customer base, where I am actively leveraging my relationships to open new doors, engage the C-suite, and drive strategic expansion conversations top down. MongoDB, Inc. is increasingly recognized as the architectural foundation powering innovation for frontier model companies, leading digital natives expanding into AI, and AI native organizations scaling globally. The database layer has endured through multiple technology shifts over the past 60 years, and it is even more critical in this AI shift.

pairs.en: AI and agentic applications require memory, state, and high-quality retrieval capabilities native to our modern OLTP platform, which powers real-time applications without ETL or bolt-on systems through integrated search, vector search, and embeddings. In this platform shift, OLTP is the high ground, and MongoDB, Inc. is purpose built to win. Notably, Emergent Labs, a leading AI white-coding platform in India that just crossed a $100,000,000 run rate, selected Atlas over PostgreSQL to power AI agents that build production-ready applications from natural language prompts. They power nearly 6,000,000 applications built across 190 countries and handle applications that average 35,000 lines of code with some reaching 300k, all made possible with Atlas' flexible document architecture and reliable scale.
pairs.zh:
AI和智能代理应用需要与我们现代OLTP平台原生集成的内存、状态和高质量检索能力，该平台通过集成搜索、向量搜索和嵌入，无需ETL或附加系统即可为实时应用提供支持。在这一平台转型中，OLTP是制高点，而MongoDB, Inc. 正是为此而生。值得注意的是，印度领先的AI白码平台Emergent Labs刚刚突破了1亿美元的运行率，他们选择Atlas而非PostgreSQL来为AI代理提供支持，这些AI代理能够根据自然语言提示构建生产级应用。Emergent Labs支持近600万个在190个国家构建的应用，处理平均代码量达35,000行、部分甚至达到30万行的应用，这一切都得益于Atlas灵活的文档架构和可靠的扩展能力。

AI and agentic applications require memory, state, and high-quality retrieval capabilities native to our modern OLTP platform, which powers real-time applications without ETL or bolt-on systems through integrated search, vector search, and embeddings. In this platform shift, OLTP is the high ground, and MongoDB, Inc. is purpose built to win. Notably, Emergent Labs, a leading AI white-coding platform in India that just crossed a $100,000,000 run rate, selected Atlas over PostgreSQL to power AI agents that build production-ready applications from natural language prompts. They power nearly 6,000,000 applications built across 190 countries and handle applications that average 35,000 lines of code with some reaching 300k, all made possible with Atlas' flexible document architecture and reliable scale.

pairs.en: We are also fueling innovation at AI native customer Eleven Labs, which is redefining conversational AI with its new enterprise agentic platform. Eleven Labs selected Atlas to power the critical long-term memory and knowledge base for their autonomous agents. By leveraging Atlas Search and Vector Search, they enable their agents to retain complex context and deliver highly personalized interactions in real-time and at global scale, supporting the rapid expansion to $330,000,000 of ARR and an $11,000,000,000 valuation. Another tailwind is the renewed importance of on-premises deployment enterprise architectures.
pairs.zh:
我们也在推动AI原生客户Eleven Labs的创新，该公司正通过其全新的企业代理平台重新定义对话式AI。Eleven Labs选择Atlas来为其自主代理提供关键的长时记忆和知识库支持。通过利用Atlas Search和Vector Search，他们的代理能够保留复杂上下文，并实时、全球范围内提供高度个性化的交互，从而支撑其ARR迅速扩张至330,000,000美元，估值达到11,000,000,000美元。另一个利好因素是本地部署企业架构重新受到重视。

We are also fueling innovation at AI native customer Eleven Labs, which is redefining conversational AI with its new enterprise agentic platform. Eleven Labs selected Atlas to power the critical long-term memory and knowledge base for their autonomous agents. By leveraging Atlas Search and Vector Search, they enable their agents to retain complex context and deliver highly personalized interactions in real-time and at global scale, supporting the rapid expansion to $330,000,000 of ARR and an $11,000,000,000 valuation. Another tailwind is the renewed importance of on-premises deployment enterprise architectures.

pairs.en: Many large customers, particularly in regulated industries such as financial services, telecommunications, and government, view EA as mission critical and are making long-term commitments that reflect the need for operational resilience and support for data that will not move to the public cloud. Consequently, I am confident in the durability of our EA business. Pursuing feature parity to Atlas and continued go-to-market momentum are key priorities as we move forward. For example, Axon Networks, a global leader in telecom network management serving 32 telcos and over 90,000,000 homes and enterprises, selected EA as the foundation for its operator-as-a-service platform. This platform delivers a real-time digital twin and an API-first architecture designed to handle massive data peaks and high-volume time-series workloads.
pairs.zh:
许多大型客户，尤其是在金融服务、电信和政府等受监管行业，将EA视为关键任务，并正在做出长期承诺，这反映了对运营韧性以及对不会迁移至公有云的数据支持的需求。因此，我对EA业务的持久性充满信心。追求与Atlas的功能对等以及持续的市场推广势头，是我们前进中的关键优先事项。例如，全球电信网络管理领导者Axon Networks（服务于32家电信运营商及超过9000万家庭和企业）选择了EA作为其运营商即服务平台的基础。该平台提供实时数字孪生和API优先架构，旨在处理海量数据峰值和高容量时间序列工作负载。

原文：
Many large customers, particularly in regulated industries such as financial services, telecommunications, and government, view EA as mission critical and are making long-term commitments that reflect the need for operational resilience and support for data that will not move to the public cloud. Consequently, I am confident in the durability of our EA business. Pursuing feature parity to Atlas and continued go-to-market momentum are key priorities as we move forward. For example, Axon Networks, a global leader in telecom network management serving 32 telcos and over 90,000,000 homes and enterprises, selected EA as the foundation for its operator-as-a-service platform. This platform delivers a real-time digital twin and an API-first architecture designed to handle massive data peaks and high-volume time-series workloads.

pairs.en: EA provides the flexibility to run across mission-critical environments, including hyperscalers and bare metal, along with the enterprise-grade security and operational tooling required to support Axon's AI-first autonomous networking platform at scale. What is truly compelling about our platform is that these tailwinds serve as a powerful force multiplier for one another. The combined power of these capabilities—the flexibility of the document model, the performance and scale of Atlas, the ability to run anywhere, and our integrated AI functionality—is what really resonates with our customers. A marquee example of the platform in action is Adobe, which expanded its strategic partnership and long-term commitment with us to accelerate AI-driven innovation.
pairs.zh:
EA提供了跨任务关键环境运行的灵活性，包括hyperscalers和bare metal，同时还具备支持Axon以AI为先的自主网络平台规模化所需的企业级安全与运营工具。我们平台真正引人注目的是，这些利好因素彼此形成了强大的力量倍增效应。这些能力的综合力量——文档模型的灵活性、Atlas的性能与规模、随处运行的能力以及我们集成的AI功能——正是客户所看重之处。一个典型的平台应用案例是Adobe，它扩大与我们战略合作和长期承诺，以加速AI驱动的创新。

原文：
EA provides the flexibility to run across mission-critical environments, including hyperscalers and bare metal, along with the enterprise-grade security and operational tooling required to support Axon's AI-first autonomous networking platform at scale. What is truly compelling about our platform is that these tailwinds serve as a powerful force multiplier for one another. The combined power of these capabilities—the flexibility of the document model, the performance and scale of Atlas, the ability to run anywhere, and our integrated AI functionality—is what really resonates with our customers. A marquee example of the platform in action is Adobe, which expanded its strategic partnership and long-term commitment with us to accelerate AI-driven innovation.

pairs.en: MongoDB, Inc. now underpins a range of Adobe's key initiatives, including agentic experiences powered by Atlas Vector Search and soon Voyage embeddings. Adobe leverages Atlas to manage large fleets and always-on database deployments at global scale, while also continuing to partner with us for support of self-managed business-critical workloads on EA, highlighting our ability to operate seamlessly across both cloud and on-prem environments. After spending time with 200 customers, partners, and our go-to-market teams globally, it has become increasingly clear that we have a massive opportunity ahead of us.
pairs.zh:
MongoDB, Inc. 现在支撑着Adobe的一系列关键举措，包括由Atlas Vector Search驱动的代理体验，以及即将推出的Voyage嵌入技术。Adobe利用Atlas在全球范围内管理庞大的数据库集群和始终在线的数据库部署，同时继续与我们合作，在EA上获得对自管理关键业务负载的支持，这凸显了我们在云环境和本地环境之间无缝运作的能力。在与全球200位客户、合作伙伴及市场团队的交流后，我越来越清楚地看到，我们面前有一个巨大的机遇。

MongoDB, Inc. now underpins a range of Adobe's key initiatives, including agentic experiences powered by Atlas Vector Search and soon Voyage embeddings. Adobe leverages Atlas to manage large fleets and always-on database deployments at global scale, while also continuing to partner with us for support of self-managed business-critical workloads on EA, highlighting our ability to operate seamlessly across both cloud and on-prem environments. After spending time with 200 customers, partners, and our go-to-market teams globally, it has become increasingly clear that we have a massive opportunity ahead of us.

pairs.en: The strength of our platform and the depth of our customer relationships is a direct reflection of our exceptional global team, and I am proud to say we have world-class talent across engineering, go-to-market, and G&A functions. During the upcoming year, my focus will be to build upon what is already working by first, remaining relentlessly customer-focused to deepen strategic partnerships and accelerate growth, particularly across large enterprises and AI native customers here in Silicon Valley. Second, accelerate our innovation agenda by empowering product and engineering teams to build a generational multi-cloud data platform for the AI era. Third, thoughtfully scale our self-serve motion to expand adoption across the long tail, with a disproportionate focus on AI native companies.
pairs.zh:
我们平台的实力以及客户关系的深度，直接体现了我们卓越的全球团队。我自豪地说，我们在工程、市场推广和总务与行政职能方面拥有世界一流的人才。在未来一年，我的重点是巩固已有成效：首先，始终保持以客户为中心，深化战略合作伙伴关系，加速增长，尤其是在大型企业和硅谷的人工智能原生客户群体中。其次，通过赋能产品和工程团队，打造面向人工智能时代的跨代多云数据平台，加速创新议程。第三，精心扩展自助服务模式，以扩大在长尾客户群体中的采用率，并重点关注人工智能原生公司。

The strength of our platform and the depth of our customer relationships is a direct reflection of our exceptional global team, and I am proud to say we have world-class talent across engineering, go-to-market, and G&A functions. During the upcoming year, my focus will be to build upon what is already working by first, remaining relentlessly customer-focused to deepen strategic partnerships and accelerate growth, particularly across large enterprises and AI native customers here in Silicon Valley. Second, accelerate our innovation agenda by empowering product and engineering teams to build a generational multi-cloud data platform for the AI era. Third, thoughtfully scale our self-serve motion to expand adoption across the long tail, with a disproportionate focus on AI native companies.

pairs.en: Fourth, drive operational excellence across go-to-market, product, and G&A to enable our teams to perform at their best while sustaining durable, profitable growth. Finally, I wanted to provide an update on our go-to-market leadership. Effective tomorrow, 03/03/2026, Erica Woolini joins MongoDB, Inc. as our Chief Customer Officer reporting directly to me to accelerate our next phase of growth. Erica brings a rare blend of experience serving large enterprise customers at Deloitte and scaling go-to-market growth at ServiceNow. At MongoDB, Inc., she will focus on accelerating our partner growth engine, deepening our enterprise footprint, and ensuring a seamless, world-class experience across the entire customer life cycle.
pairs.zh:
第四，推动市场推广、产品及行政管理部门的卓越运营，使我们的团队能够发挥最佳水平，同时维持持久且盈利的增长。最后，我想汇报一下市场推广领导层的最新情况。自2026年3月3日起，Erica Woolini加入MongoDB, Inc.担任首席客户官，直接向我汇报，以加速我们下一阶段的增长。Erica带来了罕见的能力组合：她曾在德勤服务大型企业客户，并在ServiceNow推动市场推广增长。在MongoDB, Inc.，她将专注于加速合作伙伴增长引擎、深化企业客户覆盖，并确保在整个客户生命周期内提供无缝的一流体验。

Fourth, drive operational excellence across go-to-market, product, and G&A to enable our teams to perform at their best while sustaining durable, profitable growth. Finally, I wanted to provide an update on our go-to-market leadership. Effective tomorrow, 03/03/2026, Erica Woolini joins MongoDB, Inc. as our Chief Customer Officer reporting directly to me to accelerate our next phase of growth. Erica brings a rare blend of experience serving large enterprise customers at Deloitte and scaling go-to-market growth at ServiceNow. At MongoDB, Inc., she will focus on accelerating our partner growth engine, deepening our enterprise footprint, and ensuring a seamless, world-class experience across the entire customer life cycle.

pairs.en: As noted in our earnings press release, Cedric Pash, President of Field Operations, and Paul Kepambesis, Chief Revenue Officer, are leaving MongoDB, Inc. We have been thoughtfully planning this transition for some time, and we believe now is the right moment for this change. I want to extend my sincere gratitude to both Cedric and Paul for their contributions over the last decade. They were truly instrumental in building our go-to-market foundation. Looking ahead, we have a deep bench of go-to-market talent and the team is well positioned to execute against our objectives without disruption. We are in the latter stages of a search for a new CRO.
pairs.zh:
正如我们在财报新闻稿中所述，现场运营总裁Cedric Pash和首席营收官Paul Kepambesis即将离开MongoDB, Inc.。我们已为此过渡进行了周密的规划，并认为现在是做出这一改变的合适时机。我谨对Cedric和Paul在过去十年中的贡献表示诚挚感谢。他们在构建我们的市场进入基础方面发挥了关键作用。展望未来，我们拥有深厚的市场进入人才储备，团队完全有能力在不造成干扰的情况下执行我们的目标。我们正在寻找新首席营收官的最后阶段。

As noted in our earnings press release, Cedric Pash, President of Field Operations, and Paul Kepambesis, Chief Revenue Officer, are leaving MongoDB, Inc. We have been thoughtfully planning this transition for some time, and we believe now is the right moment for this change. I want to extend my sincere gratitude to both Cedric and Paul for their contributions over the last decade. They were truly instrumental in building our go-to-market foundation. Looking ahead, we have a deep bench of go-to-market talent and the team is well positioned to execute against our objectives without disruption. We are in the latter stages of a search for a new CRO.

pairs.en: The caliber of these candidates is a testament to our momentum and the significant opportunity ahead. Paul will remain CRO through Q1 and serve as an adviser through Q2 to ensure a seamless transition to the new CRO. With that, I will now hand the call over to Michael Berry to discuss the financial results in greater detail.
pairs.zh:
这些候选人的水准证明了我们的发展势头以及前方的重大机遇。Paul将继续担任CRO直至第一季度，并在第二季度担任顾问，以确保顺利过渡到新的CRO。现在，我将把电话交给Michael Berry，请他更详细地讨论财务业绩。

The caliber of these candidates is a testament to our momentum and the significant opportunity ahead. Paul will remain CRO through Q1 and serve as an adviser through Q2 to ensure a seamless transition to the new CRO. With that, I will now hand the call over to Michael Berry to discuss the financial results in greater detail.

pairs.en: Michael Berry:Thank you, CJ, and good afternoon to everyone on the call. I will begin with a review of our fourth quarter fiscal 2026 results and then finish with the outlook for the first quarter and full year fiscal 2027. In order to spend more time on the fiscal 2027 outlook, I will be a little more concise on my fourth quarter comments. I will be discussing both GAAP and non-GAAP results. As CJ mentioned, we had another strong quarter as we exceeded all of our guidance ranges and finished our fiscal year on a high note. In the fourth quarter, total revenue was $695,000,000, up 27% year over year and above the high end of our guidance.
pairs.zh:
Michael Berry：谢谢CJ，也下午好，各位参会者。我将首先回顾2026财年第四季度的业绩，然后介绍2027财年第一季度及全年的展望。为了腾出更多时间讨论2027财年的展望，我对第四季度业绩的评论会尽量简洁。我将同时讨论GAAP和非GAAP业绩。正如CJ提到的，我们又一次交出了强劲的季度成绩，所有指引指标均超出预期，为财年画上圆满句号。第四季度总收入为$695,000,000，同比增长27%，并超出我们指引的高端。

Michael Berry:Thank you, CJ, and good afternoon to everyone on the call. I will begin with a review of our fourth quarter fiscal 2026 results and then finish with the outlook for the first quarter and full year fiscal 2027. In order to spend more time on the fiscal 2027 outlook, I will be a little more concise on my fourth quarter comments. I will be discussing both GAAP and non-GAAP results. As CJ mentioned, we had another strong quarter as we exceeded all of our guidance ranges and finished our fiscal year on a high note. In the fourth quarter, total revenue was $695,000,000, up 27% year over year and above the high end of our guidance.

pairs.en: Our income from operations was $159,000,000 for a 23% operating margin, compared to 21% in the year-ago period. We achieved positive GAAP operating income in the fourth quarter. We are very pleased with our stronger-than-expected operating margin results, which benefited entirely from our revenue outperformance. Net income in the fourth quarter was $143,000,000, or $1.65 per share, based on 86,500,000 diluted shares outstanding. This compares to net income of $108,000,000, or $1.28 per share, on 84,600,000 diluted shares outstanding in the year-ago period. Shifting to our product mix, Atlas revenue momentum remained strong, with year-over-year growth of 29% in the fourth quarter, which accounted for 72% of total revenue, up from 71% in the year-ago period.
pairs.zh:
我们的营业收入为1.59亿美元，营业利润率为23%，而去年同期为21%。我们在第四季度实现了正的GAAP营业收入。我们对超出预期的营业利润率感到非常满意，这完全得益于收入的超预期表现。第四季度净利润为1.43亿美元，基于86,500,000稀释后流通股计算，每股收益1.65美元。相比之下，去年同期净利润为1.08亿美元，基于84,600,000稀释后流通股计算，每股收益1.28美元。转向产品组合，Atlas的收入势头依然强劲，第四季度同比增长29%，占总收入的72%，而去年同期为71%。

Our income from operations was $159,000,000 for a 23% operating margin, compared to 21% in the year-ago period. We achieved positive GAAP operating income in the fourth quarter. We are very pleased with our stronger-than-expected operating margin results, which benefited entirely from our revenue outperformance. Net income in the fourth quarter was $143,000,000, or $1.65 per share, based on 86,500,000 diluted shares outstanding. This compares to net income of $108,000,000, or $1.28 per share, on 84,600,000 diluted shares outstanding in the year-ago period. Shifting to our product mix, Atlas revenue momentum remained strong, with year-over-year growth of 29% in the fourth quarter, which accounted for 72% of total revenue, up from 71% in the year-ago period.

pairs.en: Atlas growth was driven by continued strength with our largest customers in North America and Europe, customers and our total company net ARR expansion rate, which increased to 121% in the fourth quarter, up from 120% last quarter and 119% a year ago. Turning to non-Atlas, we experienced strong momentum during the fourth quarter, driven by strength with financial services, public sector, and technology customers that are choosing to build with MongoDB, Inc. long term for their most mission-critical applications. This resulted in strong multiyear revenue and non-Atlas ARR, which reflects the underlying revenue growth of this product without the impact of changes in duration.
pairs.zh:
Atlas的增长得益于我们在北美和欧洲最大客户的持续强劲表现，以及公司整体净ARR扩张率从上一季度的120%和去年同期的119%提升至第四季度的121%。转向非Atlas业务，我们在第四季度经历了强劲势头，这得益于金融服务、公共部门以及选择长期使用MongoDB, Inc.构建其最关键任务应用程序的技术客户的强劲表现。这带来了强劲的多年期收入和非Atlas ARR，这些指标反映了该产品的基础收入增长，不受期限变化的影响。

Atlas growth was driven by continued strength with our largest customers in North America and Europe, customers and our total company net ARR expansion rate, which increased to 121% in the fourth quarter, up from 120% last quarter and 119% a year ago. Turning to non-Atlas, we experienced strong momentum during the fourth quarter, driven by strength with financial services, public sector, and technology customers that are choosing to build with MongoDB, Inc. long term for their most mission-critical applications. This resulted in strong multiyear revenue and non-Atlas ARR, which reflects the underlying revenue growth of this product without the impact of changes in duration.

pairs.en: Non-Atlas ARR grew 13% year over year, reflecting the momentum we are seeing in the business. The strength in non-Atlas also resulted in a higher-than-expected number of larger deals with bundled Atlas and EA products. This resulted in a greater-than-expected attribution of revenue to EA versus Atlas in the fourth quarter. Adding back this impact, Atlas growth would have been approximately 30%. We are encouraged to see more of our customers growing on both Atlas and EA and believe these deals illustrate the strategic importance of having both cloud and on-prem solutions for many of our largest customers.
pairs.zh:
非Atlas ARR同比增长13%，反映了我们当前业务中的增长势头。非Atlas业务的强劲表现也带来了更多捆绑Atlas和EA产品的大型交易，超出预期。这导致第四季度收入归属中EA的比例高于Atlas。加回这一影响后，Atlas的增长率约为30%。我们欣喜地看到更多客户同时使用Atlas和EA增长，这些交易表明，对于许多大型客户而言，同时拥有云端和本地解决方案具有战略重要性。

Non-Atlas ARR grew 13% year over year, reflecting the momentum we are seeing in the business. The strength in non-Atlas also resulted in a higher-than-expected number of larger deals with bundled Atlas and EA products. This resulted in a greater-than-expected attribution of revenue to EA versus Atlas in the fourth quarter. Adding back this impact, Atlas growth would have been approximately 30%. We are encouraged to see more of our customers growing on both Atlas and EA and believe these deals illustrate the strategic importance of having both cloud and on-prem solutions for many of our largest customers.

pairs.en: You can see the strength in the growth of deferred revenue as well as the growth in RPO, which grew from $748,000,000 at the end of fiscal 2025 to $1,470,000,000 at the end of fiscal 2026, a year-over-year growth of 97%. We ended the quarter with 2,799 customers with at least $100,000 in ARR and 402 customers with at least $1,000,000 in ARR, representing 1,726% year-over-year growth respectively. For each of these cohorts, ARR is growing even faster, reinforcing the benefit of our upmarket focus. Of our Atlas customers generating at least $100,000 in ARR, 44% are leveraging two or more features of our platform, which is up from 36% in the year-ago quarter.
pairs.zh:
你可以看到递延收入增长以及RPO增长的动力，从2025财年末的$748,000,000增长到2026财年末的$1,470,000,000，同比增长97%。本季度末，我们拥有2,799个ARR至少为$100,000的客户，以及402个ARR至少为$1,000,000的客户，分别同比增长1,726%。对于这些客户群体，ARR的增长速度甚至更快，进一步印证了我们聚焦高端市场的好处。在我们的Atlas客户中，ARR至少为$100,000的客户里有44%正在使用我们平台的两项或更多功能，高于去年同期的36%。

You can see the strength in the growth of deferred revenue as well as the growth in RPO, which grew from $748,000,000 at the end of fiscal 2025 to $1,470,000,000 at the end of fiscal 2026, a year-over-year growth of 97%. We ended the quarter with 2,799 customers with at least $100,000 in ARR and 402 customers with at least $1,000,000 in ARR, representing 1,726% year-over-year growth respectively. For each of these cohorts, ARR is growing even faster, reinforcing the benefit of our upmarket focus. Of our Atlas customers generating at least $100,000 in ARR, 44% are leveraging two or more features of our platform, which is up from 36% in the year-ago quarter.

pairs.en: Average revenue from these platform customers is meaningfully higher on average as compared to the rest of the Atlas base, illustrating the benefit of our platform capabilities. Turning to the balance sheet and cash flow, we ended the fourth quarter with nearly $2,400,000,000 in cash, cash equivalents, short-term investments, and restricted cash. We spent $55,000,000 to repurchase 133,000 shares and used $60,000,000 for the cash settlement of taxes on employee RSUs. Operating cash flow remains strong at $180,000,000, and free cash flow was $177,000,000, which compares to $51,000,000 and $23,000,000 respectively in the year-ago period.
pairs.zh:
这些平台客户的平均收入显著高于Atlas其他客户群，充分体现了我们平台能力带来的优势。接下来看资产负债表和现金流，第四季度末我们持有近$2,400,000,000现金、现金等价物、短期投资及受限现金。我们投入$55,000,000回购了133,000股股票，并支出$60,000,000用于员工RSU相关的税费现金结算。经营性现金流保持强劲，达$180,000,000，自由现金流为$177,000,000，而上年同期分别为$51,000,000和$23,000,000。

Average revenue from these platform customers is meaningfully higher on average as compared to the rest of the Atlas base, illustrating the benefit of our platform capabilities. Turning to the balance sheet and cash flow, we ended the fourth quarter with nearly $2,400,000,000 in cash, cash equivalents, short-term investments, and restricted cash. We spent $55,000,000 to repurchase 133,000 shares and used $60,000,000 for the cash settlement of taxes on employee RSUs. Operating cash flow remains strong at $180,000,000, and free cash flow was $177,000,000, which compares to $51,000,000 and $23,000,000 respectively in the year-ago period.

pairs.en: Our cash flow results were driven primarily by strong operating profit and improving working capital dynamics, particularly related to higher cash collections mainly driven by the higher-than-expected multiyear EA deal. Now I would like to share a few guiding principles and some of the assumptions underlying our outlook for Q1 and fiscal 2027. To begin, we continue to believe in the long-term model presented at Investor Day last September and remain committed to growing Atlas by greater than 20% and being a Rule of 40 company. We will achieve this goal through a combination of revenue growth and margin expansion, but to be clear, revenue growth will be the main driver of improved profitability.
pairs.zh:
我们的现金流表现主要得益于强劲的营业利润和营运资本动态的改善，特别是与高于预期的多年期EA合同相关的更高现金收款。现在我想分享一些指导原则以及我们对Q1和2027财年展望所依据的假设。首先，我们仍然坚信去年9月投资者日提出的长期模式，并继续致力于使Atlas增长超过20%，并成为一家Rule of 40公司。我们将通过收入增长和利润率扩张相结合来实现这一目标，但需要明确的是，收入增长将是盈利能力改善的主要驱动力。

Our cash flow results were driven primarily by strong operating profit and improving working capital dynamics, particularly related to higher cash collections mainly driven by the higher-than-expected multiyear EA deal. Now I would like to share a few guiding principles and some of the assumptions underlying our outlook for Q1 and fiscal 2027. To begin, we continue to believe in the long-term model presented at Investor Day last September and remain committed to growing Atlas by greater than 20% and being a Rule of 40 company. We will achieve this goal through a combination of revenue growth and margin expansion, but to be clear, revenue growth will be the main driver of improved profitability.

pairs.en: Our outlook assumes the business environment remains relatively stable and we operate under conditions similar to what we experienced over the course of the past fiscal year. As I mentioned at our Investor Day in September, we have not changed our guidance philosophy as we will provide an outlook with more upsides than downsides specifically related to the EA business. We are early in the year, and we want to be mindful there could be risks that we do not have line of sight to at this time. Now let us get into the details. Starting with Atlas, we have continued to see strong momentum and experienced relatively consistent consumption growth through the course of the past year.
pairs.zh:
我们的展望假设商业环境保持相对稳定，且运营条件与过去一个财年经历的情况相似。正如我在九月的投资者日（Investor Day）上提到的，我们并未改变业绩指引理念，将提供更多上行空间而非下行风险的展望，这些展望尤其与EA业务相关。目前处于财年初期，我们需谨慎留意当前可能尚未察觉的风险。现在来看具体细节。首先，关于Atlas，过去一年中我们持续看到强劲势头，且消费增长相对稳定。

原文：
Our outlook assumes the business environment remains relatively stable and we operate under conditions similar to what we experienced over the course of the past fiscal year. As I mentioned at our Investor Day in September, we have not changed our guidance philosophy as we will provide an outlook with more upsides than downsides specifically related to the EA business. We are early in the year, and we want to be mindful there could be risks that we do not have line of sight to at this time. Now let us get into the details. Starting with Atlas, we have continued to see strong momentum and experienced relatively consistent consumption growth through the course of the past year.

pairs.en: We expect these trends to continue through fiscal 2027 and would also note that as Atlas has grown larger, this has helped limit the volatility from specific customer cohorts. Based on our continued confidence in our market positioning, customer feedback, and product advantages, we currently expect to see Atlas revenue growth of approximately 26% in Q1 and 21% to 23% in fiscal 2027. This outlook reflects our continued confidence in Atlas while taking into account we are a consumption business and visibility is more limited in the back half of the fiscal year.
pairs.zh:
我们预计这些趋势将持续到2027财年，并指出随着Atlas规模扩大，这有助于限制特定客户群带来的波动。基于我们对市场定位、客户反馈和产品优势的持续信心，我们目前预计Atlas第一季度营收增长约26%，2027财年增长21%至23%。这一展望反映了我们对Atlas的持续信心，同时考虑到我们是一家消费型企业，且财年下半年的可见度较为有限。

We expect these trends to continue through fiscal 2027 and would also note that as Atlas has grown larger, this has helped limit the volatility from specific customer cohorts. Based on our continued confidence in our market positioning, customer feedback, and product advantages, we currently expect to see Atlas revenue growth of approximately 26% in Q1 and 21% to 23% in fiscal 2027. This outlook reflects our continued confidence in Atlas while taking into account we are a consumption business and visibility is more limited in the back half of the fiscal year.

pairs.en: For non-Atlas, we have continued to see healthy ARR trends and we have been positively surprised by the momentum we experienced with large multiyear deals in fiscal 2026. While we remain optimistic regarding our ability to grow the business over the long term, it remains difficult to predict, and we will only include deals in our forecast that have either closed or have a high probability of closing to limit the risk of a negative surprise.
pairs.zh:
对于非Atlas业务，我们持续看到健康的ARR趋势，并且对2026财年大型多年期交易带来的势头感到惊喜。尽管我们长期仍对业务增长能力持乐观态度，但预测依然困难，我们只会将已完成或极有可能完成的交易纳入预测，以限制意外下滑的风险。

For non-Atlas, we have continued to see healthy ARR trends and we have been positively surprised by the momentum we experienced with large multiyear deals in fiscal 2026. While we remain optimistic regarding our ability to grow the business over the long term, it remains difficult to predict, and we will only include deals in our forecast that have either closed or have a high probability of closing to limit the risk of a negative surprise.

pairs.en: At this point, we expect our non-Atlas business to see mid to upper single-digit growth in Q1 and low to mid single-digit growth in fiscal 2027, which reflects our belief that the impact of duration will neither be a significant headwind nor tailwind to growth for the year. In terms of AI, we remain optimistic regarding our outlook and are seeing encouraging trends with a number of AI natives. While this subset of customers has significant potential, many of them remain early in their MongoDB, Inc. journey and are not yet meaningful drivers of revenue. Turning to profitability, we remain committed to driving revenue growth and expect to expand operating margin by 100 basis points in fiscal 2027.
pairs.zh:
目前，我们预计非Atlas业务在第一季度将实现中高个位数增长，在2027财年将实现低到中个位数增长，这反映出我们认为期限影响既不会成为今年增长的重大阻力，也不会成为显著助力。在AI方面，我们对前景保持乐观，并看到许多AI原生企业呈现出令人鼓舞的趋势。虽然这部分客户潜力巨大，但其中许多仍处于使用MongoDB, Inc.的早期阶段，尚未成为有意义的收入驱动力。在盈利能力方面，我们仍致力于推动收入增长，并预计2027财年运营利润率将扩大100个基点。

At this point, we expect our non-Atlas business to see mid to upper single-digit growth in Q1 and low to mid single-digit growth in fiscal 2027, which reflects our belief that the impact of duration will neither be a significant headwind nor tailwind to growth for the year. In terms of AI, we remain optimistic regarding our outlook and are seeing encouraging trends with a number of AI natives. While this subset of customers has significant potential, many of them remain early in their MongoDB, Inc. journey and are not yet meaningful drivers of revenue. Turning to profitability, we remain committed to driving revenue growth and expect to expand operating margin by 100 basis points in fiscal 2027.

pairs.en: We will achieve this expansion while investing for growth. Some of these investments include enhancing our AI capabilities, further integrating Voyage, bringing feature parity to EA relative to Atlas, building out our presence in Japan, as well as strengthening our U.S. federal business. We will also continue to invest in marketing programs to develop our awareness and select quota-carrying headcount. With respect to cash flow, we made meaningful progress in cash management during fiscal 2026 with our operating cash conversion exceeding 100% and up significantly from the approximately 50% experienced in fiscal 2024 and 2025. This remains a key area of focus, and we would expect cash flow to remain healthy in fiscal 2027.
pairs.zh:
我们将通过投资增长来实现这一扩张。其中一些投资包括提升我们的AI能力、进一步整合Voyage、使EA在功能上与Atlas对齐、拓展在日本的市场布局，以及加强我们的美国联邦业务。我们还将继续投资营销项目以提升品牌知名度，并增加部分带销售配额的人员。在现金流方面，我们在2026财年的现金管理上取得了显著进展，经营现金转化率超过100%，相比2024和2025财年的大约50%大幅提升。这仍是一个关键关注领域，我们预计2027财年的现金流将保持健康。

We will achieve this expansion while investing for growth. Some of these investments include enhancing our AI capabilities, further integrating Voyage, bringing feature parity to EA relative to Atlas, building out our presence in Japan, as well as strengthening our U.S. federal business. We will also continue to invest in marketing programs to develop our awareness and select quota-carrying headcount. With respect to cash flow, we made meaningful progress in cash management during fiscal 2026 with our operating cash conversion exceeding 100% and up significantly from the approximately 50% experienced in fiscal 2024 and 2025. This remains a key area of focus, and we would expect cash flow to remain healthy in fiscal 2027.

pairs.en: We currently expect cash conversion in the 80% to 100% range during the upcoming year and on a longer-term basis, which is in line with our long-term model. Finally, we will continue to execute our share buyback program to partially offset dilution from employee equity awards and settle the taxes due on the vesting of employee RSUs with cash instead of issuing new shares. In fiscal 2027, we currently plan to commit 100% of our free cash flow to these two actions, and we will also benefit from the settlement of over 1,000,000 shares of stock for the cap calls associated with our 2026 notes that matured in January 2026.
pairs.zh:
我们目前预计，在未来一年及长期基础上，现金转换率将在80%到100%之间，这与我们的长期模型一致。最后，我们将继续执行股票回购计划，以部分抵消员工股权激励带来的稀释，并用现金而非发行新股来结算员工限制性股票单位（RSUs）归属时产生的应缴税款。在2027财年，我们目前计划将100%的自由现金流用于这两项行动，此外，我们还将受益于与2026年到期的2026年票据相关的上限认购权（cap calls）所对应的超过1,000,000股股票的结算。

We currently expect cash conversion in the 80% to 100% range during the upcoming year and on a longer-term basis, which is in line with our long-term model. Finally, we will continue to execute our share buyback program to partially offset dilution from employee equity awards and settle the taxes due on the vesting of employee RSUs with cash instead of issuing new shares. In fiscal 2027, we currently plan to commit 100% of our free cash flow to these two actions, and we will also benefit from the settlement of over 1,000,000 shares of stock for the cap calls associated with our 2026 notes that matured in January 2026.

pairs.en: We will continue to manage share count prudently for the long term and demonstrate our commitment to being good stewards of your capital. Now let us shift to guidance for the first quarter and fiscal 2027. For the first quarter, we expect revenue of $659,000,000 to $664,000,000, which equates to 20% to 21% year-over-year growth. We expect non-GAAP income from operations to be in the range of $105,000,000 to $109,000,000 for an operating margin of approximately 16.5% at the high end. We expect non-GAAP net income per share to be in the range of $1.15 to $1.19 based on 86,200,000 diluted shares outstanding.
pairs.zh:
我们会继续长期审慎管理股票数量，展现我们对妥善管理各位资本的承诺。现在我们来转向第一季度和2027财年的业绩指引。第一季度，我们预计营收为 $659,000,000 至 $664,000,000，相当于同比增长20%至21%。我们预计非GAAP经营利润在 $105,000,000 至 $109,000,000 之间，高端利润率约为16.5%。我们预计基于86,200,000稀释流通股的非GAAP每股净收益在 $1.15 至 $1.19 之间。

We will continue to manage share count prudently for the long term and demonstrate our commitment to being good stewards of your capital. Now let us shift to guidance for the first quarter and fiscal 2027. For the first quarter, we expect revenue of $659,000,000 to $664,000,000, which equates to 20% to 21% year-over-year growth. We expect non-GAAP income from operations to be in the range of $105,000,000 to $109,000,000 for an operating margin of approximately 16.5% at the high end. We expect non-GAAP net income per share to be in the range of $1.15 to $1.19 based on 86,200,000 diluted shares outstanding.

pairs.en: For fiscal 2027, we expect revenue to be in the range of $2,860,000,000 to $2,900,000,000, representing full-year revenue growth of 16% to 18%. We expect non-GAAP income from operations of $545,000,000 to $565,000,000 for an operating margin of approximately 19.5% at the high end of guidance. We expect non-GAAP net income per share to be in the range of $5.75 to $5.93 based on 86,700,000 diluted shares outstanding. Note that the non-GAAP net income per share guidance for the first quarter and fiscal 2027 assumes a non-GAAP tax provision of 20%. To summarize, we had another strong quarter and feel very good about the business heading into fiscal 2027.
pairs.zh:
对于2027财年，我们预计收入将在$2,860,000,000至$2,900,000,000之间，同比增长16%至18%。预计非GAAP运营收入为$545,000,000至$565,000,000，在指引高端对应的运营利润率约为19.5%。基于86,700,000股稀释后流通股，我们预计非GAAP每股净收益在$5.75至$5.93之间。请注意，2027财年第一季度和全年的非GAAP每股净收益指引假设非GAAP税率拨备为20%。总结而言，我们再次实现了强劲的季度表现，并对进入2027财年的业务充满信心。

For fiscal 2027, we expect revenue to be in the range of $2,860,000,000 to $2,900,000,000, representing full-year revenue growth of 16% to 18%. We expect non-GAAP income from operations of $545,000,000 to $565,000,000 for an operating margin of approximately 19.5% at the high end of guidance. We expect non-GAAP net income per share to be in the range of $5.75 to $5.93 based on 86,700,000 diluted shares outstanding. Note that the non-GAAP net income per share guidance for the first quarter and fiscal 2027 assumes a non-GAAP tax provision of 20%. To summarize, we had another strong quarter and feel very good about the business heading into fiscal 2027.

pairs.en: We are pleased with our ability to drive revenue growth across the business while expanding operating profit and driving meaningful free cash flow. We remain incredibly excited about the opportunity ahead, and we will continue to invest responsibly to drive long-term shareholder value. With that, operator, we would like to open it up for questions.
pairs.zh:

Chirantan Desai:Absolutely. So, Matt, here is how I would describe it. pairs.en: So one, Erica is going to focus on customers who have already bought MongoDB, Inc. or are expanding with MongoDB, Inc., how do they get to value, and how do they get to success? And from the attributes perspective, I want somebody who is very focused on the high end of the enterprise, understands how things work at MongoDB, Inc. from a main street perspective, but also working with the management team as we expand into both the AI natives as well as enterprises who are building more mission-critical workloads on MongoDB, Inc., including AI.
pairs.zh:
那么第一，Erica将专注于已经购买MongoDB, Inc.产品或正在扩展使用MongoDB, Inc.的客户，研究他们如何实现价值、如何获得成功。关于CRO的遴选，Paul将完整任职至第一季度，并帮助我们过渡到第二季度。从特质角度来看，我希望这个人非常关注企业高端市场，理解MongoDB, Inc.在主流市场的运作方式，同时能与管理团队协作，因为我们正在向AI原生企业和在MongoDB, Inc.上构建更多关键任务工作负载（包括AI）的企业拓展。

So one, Erica is going to focus on customers who have already bought MongoDB, Inc. or are expanding with MongoDB, Inc., how do they get to value, and how do they get to success? And from the attributes perspective, I want somebody who is very focused on the high end of the enterprise, understands how things work at MongoDB, Inc. from a main street perspective, but also working with the management team as we expand into both the AI natives as well as enterprises who are building more mission-critical workloads on MongoDB, Inc., including AI.

pairs.en: So that is the mix, I would say, is somebody who is strategic, who understands consumption-based models on how MongoDB, Inc. really operates—of course, our Enterprise Advanced business—and has relationships into the high end of the market where we are getting significant traction besides AI native companies, which is hardly—

pairs.zh:

pairs.en: Jason Ader:Yeah. Thank you, guys. For CJ, my main question is how is your product and go-to-market strategy changing, if at all, ahead of the growing reality that agents are going to be the things that are spinning up most databases and not humans in the future.
pairs.zh:
Jason Ader:是的，谢谢各位。对于CJ，我的主要问题是，随着未来代理（而非人类）将成为启动大多数数据库的主体这一现实日益明显，你们的产品和上市策略有何变化（如果有的话）？

Jason Ader:Yeah. Thank you, guys. For CJ, my main question is how is your product and go-to-market strategy changing, if at all, ahead of the growing reality that agents are going to be the things that are spinning up most databases and not humans in the future.

pairs.en: Chirantan Desai:I would say, Jason, I have a very simple philosophy here. And the philosophy also was validated by one of the AI native companies that has completely built on MongoDB, Inc. They had many choices, in many clouds, and they chose MongoDB, Inc. And my initial intuition was the same as you outlined, that MongoDB, Inc.'s success over the last many years since the company was founded in 2007 was that builders or developers love MongoDB, Inc. And if that is the premise, there was a lot of work done in the product to ensure that it is a very natural way, flexible way, while keeping the business agile—as in the database agile—so that it can move with the business.
pairs.zh:
Chirantan Desai: 我想说，Jason，我的理念非常简单。这个理念也得到了一个完全基于MongoDB, Inc.构建的AI原生公司的验证。他们有很多云平台可选，但最终选择了MongoDB, Inc.。我最初的直觉和你概述的一样：自2007年公司成立以来，MongoDB, Inc.的成功在于构建者或开发者热爱MongoDB, Inc.。如果这个前提成立，那么产品在确保自然、灵活的同时，也保持了业务的敏捷性——即数据库的敏捷性——使其能够随业务发展而调整。

Chirantan Desai:I would say, Jason, I have a very simple philosophy here. And the philosophy also was validated by one of the AI native companies that has completely built on MongoDB, Inc. They had many choices, in many clouds, and they chose MongoDB, Inc. And my initial intuition was the same as you outlined, that MongoDB, Inc.'s success over the last many years since the company was founded in 2007 was that builders or developers love MongoDB, Inc. And if that is the premise, there was a lot of work done in the product to ensure that it is a very natural way, flexible way, while keeping the business agile—as in the database agile—so that it can move with the business.

pairs.en: We want to do the exact same thing for agents. Agents also need to love MongoDB, Inc. That requires ensuring that we have all the right integration with the right places, whether it is GCP, or whether we are looking at making sure that our APIs in how you manage, how we auto-scale, how we auto-perform during these peaks and valleys—all of that truly needs to be autonomous and driven by machines, and that requires absolutely the focus from the engineering team, that how would machines look at this if they want to provision an additional node or if they want to manage a cluster because of resiliency across multiple clouds.
pairs.zh:
我们希望对智能体（agents）也采取完全相同的做法。智能体也需要热爱MongoDB, Inc.。这要求我们确保与正确的地方进行正确的集成，无论是GCP，还是确保我们的API在如何管理、如何自动扩展、如何在波峰和波谷期间自动执行性能优化——所有这些都必须真正实现自主化并由机器驱动，而这绝对需要工程团队的专注：如果机器想要调配额外节点或因为跨多个云环境的弹性而管理集群时，它们会如何看待这个问题。

We want to do the exact same thing for agents. Agents also need to love MongoDB, Inc. That requires ensuring that we have all the right integration with the right places, whether it is GCP, or whether we are looking at making sure that our APIs in how you manage, how we auto-scale, how we auto-perform during these peaks and valleys—all of that truly needs to be autonomous and driven by machines, and that requires absolutely the focus from the engineering team, that how would machines look at this if they want to provision an additional node or if they want to manage a cluster because of resiliency across multiple clouds.

pairs.en: So that will be the north star for us, that our agents will love MongoDB, Inc. as much as today human developers love MongoDB, Inc.
pairs.zh:
因此，这将成为我们的北极星：我们的代理将像今天人类开发者热爱MongoDB, Inc.一样热爱MongoDB, Inc.。

So that will be the north star for us, that our agents will love MongoDB, Inc. as much as today human developers love MongoDB, Inc.

pairs.en: The thing that I am seeing, Ryan, very specifically, is that people are initially making database decisions in these AI native companies without realizing that they will run into scale issues or potentially—there was, you know, one of the choices that people could have gone with as an AI native company—founders had a massive security concern over the weekend where a couple of governments blocked them from being used.

pairs.en: So what I find is that truly enterprise-class databases that can scale—and when I say scale specifically, as for these AI native companies, as their weekly active users or monthly active users continue to grow, like the example we had with Emergent or Eleven Labs and so on—they find that MongoDB, Inc. scales better with them.
pairs.zh:
因此我发现，真正能够扩展的企业级数据库——我这里所说的扩展，特指对于这些AI原生公司而言，随着每周活跃用户或每月活跃用户的持续增长，就像我们之前提到的Emergent或Eleven Labs等公司那样——它们发现MongoDB, Inc.能够更好地随它们一起扩展。

pairs.en: Write performance as well as query performance really matters, and us being native JSON, with search, vector search, and embeddings in one, rather than multiple moving pieces—if I have to just simplify that—that is the strength because it is an integrated platform that scales both for reads and writes, that as you scale your AI native company, they can rely that MongoDB, Inc. will scale with them.
pairs.zh:
写入性能以及查询性能确实很重要，而我们作为原生JSON，将搜索、向量搜索和嵌入集于一体，而非多个分散组件——如果非要简化的话——这就是我们的优势，因为这是一个集成平台，能够同时扩展读写能力，当你扩展你的AI原生公司时，他们可以信赖MongoDB, Inc.会随着他们一起扩展。

Write performance as well as query performance really matters, and us being native JSON, with search, vector search, and embeddings in one, rather than multiple moving pieces—if I have to just simplify that—that is the strength because it is an integrated platform that scales both for reads and writes, that as you scale your AI native company, they can rely that MongoDB, Inc. will scale with them.

pairs.en: Michael Berry:Thank you for the question. So we did have a very strong year in EA, and Q4 especially. pairs.en: So what I am seeing is the feedback is the modernization and the need for modernization is still very much relevant in the high end of the enterprise, whether it is a health company, financial services, or even government for that matter, or healthcare. pairs.en: And in today's world, the multi-cloud resiliency, whether it is on-prem and cloud or between multiple public clouds—which is an advantage we have—it is proving out more and more important between the outages that happened last year with some of the hyperscalers and the geopolitical issues that we are seeing being played out. So that is number one. Number two, system integrators, which is where we scaled at my previous company.
pairs.zh:
在当今世界，多云韧性——无论是本地部署和云之间还是多个公有云之间——这是我们的一项优势——在去年一些超大规模云服务商发生的中断以及我们看到的地缘政治问题中，它变得越来越重要。所以这是第一点。第二点，系统集成商，这是我在前一家公司扩展业务的方向。

And in today's world, the multi-cloud resiliency, whether it is on-prem and cloud or between multiple public clouds—which is an advantage we have—it is proving out more and more important between the outages that happened last year with some of the hyperscalers and the geopolitical issues that we are seeing being played out. So that is number one. Number two, system integrators, which is where we scaled at my previous company.

pairs.en: That is definitely, when you think about the modernization and the real estate on modernization to move to MongoDB, Inc., we could definitely benefit by focusing on two or three of them to start with, and that is something that our teams are saying we do need help with as we think about these two or three system integrators. And make no mistake, the third bucket is also equally important—this AI native ecosystem that includes framework providers. There are other providers like LLM providers. And what can we do with them and truly create partnerships that really matter—those are the three buckets, and that will allow us to scale for a long time.
pairs.zh:
当然，当你思考现代化以及向MongoDB, Inc.迁移的房地产现代化时，我们完全可以通过先聚焦其中两到三个领域来获益——这正是我们的团队在考虑这两三家系统集成商时所说的，我们确实需要帮助。而且毫无疑问，第三个领域同样重要——这个AI原生生态系统包括框架提供商，还有其他提供商（如LLM提供商）。我们能与他们做些什么，并真正建立有意义的合作关系——这就是这三个领域，它们将使我们能够长期扩展。

That is definitely, when you think about the modernization and the real estate on modernization to move to MongoDB, Inc., we could definitely benefit by focusing on two or three of them to start with, and that is something that our teams are saying we do need help with as we think about these two or three system integrators. And make no mistake, the third bucket is also equally important—this AI native ecosystem that includes framework providers. There are other providers like LLM providers. And what can we do with them and truly create partnerships that really matter—those are the three buckets, and that will allow us to scale for a long time.

pairs.en: So hyperscalers, a few system integrators who want to lean in on the modernization, and the AI ecosystem where we really need to make strong technology friends is how I think about it, and I think it is extremely essential to do that. And this is the inflection point.
pairs.zh:
因此，hyperscalers、一些希望积极投入现代化的系统集成商，以及我们需要建立强大技术伙伴关系的AI生态系统，这就是我的看法，而且我认为这样做极其重要。现在正是一个转折点。

So hyperscalers, a few system integrators who want to lean in on the modernization, and the AI ecosystem where we really need to make strong technology friends is how I think about it, and I think it is extremely essential to do that. And this is the inflection point.
