我有点感觉，在过去几周里，我们看到在agentic momentum方面有所加速，不一定是企业级。仍然感觉更像是消费者/个人生产力方面，但只是想确认一下你的想法，关于AI app故事可能比你预期的更早实现的重要性。

I kind of feel like over the last couple of weeks, we have seen a step up in terms of agentic momentum, not necessarily in the enterprise. Still feels kind of consumer/personal productivity, but just wanted to gut check your thoughts on the importance of the AI app story coming to fruition maybe a little bit earlier than you maybe anticipate.

pairs.en: Chirantan Desai:Yeah. I would tell you if not if, but when. Okay? So right now, we do consider—I mean, Sanjit, you know, one of the advantages that I have in speaking to all these customers, I ask them that simple question: Where are you on your agentic workloads? And I am talking about Fortune 500, okay? Or big retail companies, healthcare companies—pick one. And ask them, where are you on agentic workloads, and are they really scaling? And the answer is still, not yet. Yes, they have done a few productivity types of internally, but nothing at scale that is customer facing, even including with a large retailer on agentic e-commerce and so on.
pairs.zh:

pairs.en: So my first thing is, one day, it is going to hit in a positive way where you will have agents making a meaningful difference to the growth of our customers for either new product lines or existing product lines. We are not seeing that today in the large enterprises across pretty much most of the verticals that we speak to because, as you know, MongoDB, Inc. is across every vertical. So my simple answer is it will be someday. Not seeing that yet, and I do not want to predict it because 2025 was supposed to be that year.
pairs.zh:
所以我的第一点是，总有一天，它会以积极的方式到来——代理将对我们客户的增长产生重大影响，无论是新产品线还是现有产品线。目前，在我们接触的大多数垂直行业的大型企业中，我们还没有看到这种情况，因为如你所知，MongoDB, Inc. 覆盖了所有垂直行业。所以我的简单回答是：会有那么一天。但还没看到，我也不想预测，因为2025年原本应该是那一年。

So my first thing is, one day, it is going to hit in a positive way where you will have agents making a meaningful difference to the growth of our customers for either new product lines or existing product lines. We are not seeing that today in the large enterprises across pretty much most of the verticals that we speak to because, as you know, MongoDB, Inc. is across every vertical. So my simple answer is it will be someday. Not seeing that yet, and I do not want to predict it because 2025 was supposed to be that year.

pairs.en: And what we saw in 2025, it was mainly around coding and some vertical-specific AI, but nothing meaningful in the enterprises.

我们在2025年看到的主要是围绕编码和一些垂直领域的AI，但在企业中并没有任何实质性的进展。

And what we saw in 2025, it was mainly around coding and some vertical-specific AI, but nothing meaningful in the enterprises.

pairs.en: Sanjit Singh:And just as a follow-up, and maybe, Mike, you can hit on this. Sounds like Atlas consumption more or less came in line with your expectations, controlling for this large deal. You mentioned there is potentially lower visibility in the second half. And I wanted to assess that comment in context of how the sort of calendar year 2025, fiscal year 2026 applications and workloads—how are they ramping relative to your expectations? Maybe if you look at the first half of last year and those applications, or at the end of this year, are you satisfied with the quality of that growth in that cohort of applications?
pairs.zh:

pairs.en: Michael Berry:Yeah, thanks for the question. So I think there are a couple of questions in there. One is, yes, Q4 largely came in as we expected, except for that small thing that we talked about. There were really no abnormal things in Q4, which is great. On the comment about the second half, that is just more of a general macro comment, Sanjit, in that it is a consumption business. While our visibility is always a little bit better earlier, we are also cognizant of, hey, it is harder to forecast the back half of the year. That does not tie directly to any concern around the workloads that we have signed in the last couple of years.

Michael Berry:Yeah, thanks for the question. So I think there are a couple of questions in there. One is, yes, Q4 largely came in as we expected, except for that small thing that we talked about. pairs.en: And, yes, those continue to perform as expected, as we have talked about. The strength that we have seen is really in the larger customers, especially in the U.S. and Europe. pairs.en: Chirantan Desai:Thank you, operator. In summary, we delivered an exceptional fourth quarter highlighted by strong Atlas and non-Atlas growth, robust customer additions, and operating margin outperformance. We are issuing strong guidance for Q1 and full-year fiscal 2027 across Atlas and non-Atlas revenue, and we expect to continue expanding profitability while investing for growth, all in line with our long-term financial model. Our results demonstrate MongoDB, Inc.'s foundation is in great shape, and the company is well on its way to become the generational data platform of choice in the AI and multi-cloud era. Thank you very much for everyone joining, and we will see you soon.
pairs.zh:
谢谢，接线员。简而言之，我们第四季度表现卓越，Atlas和非Atlas业务增长强劲，客户增加稳健，运营利润率超出预期。我们为2027财年第一季度和全年发布了强劲的指引，涵盖Atlas和非Atlas收入，并预计在投资增长的同时继续扩大盈利能力，这完全符合我们的长期财务模型。我们的业绩表明MongoDB, Inc.的基础非常扎实，公司正稳步成为AI和多云时代具有代际意义的数据平台首选。非常感谢大家的参与，我们很快会再见。

Chirantan Desai:Thank you, operator. In summary, we delivered an exceptional fourth quarter highlighted by strong Atlas and non-Atlas growth, robust customer additions, and operating margin outperformance. We are issuing strong guidance for Q1 and full-year fiscal 2027 across Atlas and non-Atlas revenue, and we expect to continue expanding profitability while investing for growth, all in line with our long-term financial model. Our results demonstrate MongoDB, Inc.'s foundation is in great shape, and the company is well on its way to become the generational data platform of choice in the AI and multi-cloud era. Thank you very much for everyone joining, and we will see you soon.
